sections.paragraph:
Original: סלע

Transliteration: sela‛

Phonetic: seh'-lah

BDB Definition:

  1. crag, cliff, rock
    1. crag, cliff
    2. as stronghold of Jehovah, of security (figuratively)

Origin: from an unused root meaning to be lofty

TWOT entry: 1508a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
